package rulecoverage

func PositiveUnnecessaryMapForSetOfInts() string {
    ruleID := "unnecessary_map_for_set_of_ints"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "`map[int]bool` or `map[int]struct{}` used as a set for small dense integer ranges"
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
